title: Expand Source Data Platform Options in Migration Setup
story: As an end user, I want to select from a broader set of source data platforms when setting up a migration, so that the tool supports more real-world migration scenarios.
description:
Expand the source data platform dropdown from the current two options (Zoho and Salesforce) to a comprehensive list covering common migration sources.

### Updated Options
- Salesforce
- HubSpot
- Zoho
- Custom Cloud App
- Custom On Premise App
- Excel / CSV
- Other
acceptance_criteria: Source data dropdown contains all seven options: Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, Custom Cloud App, Custom On Premise App, Excel / CSV, Other
Existing records with Zoho or Salesforce selections remain valid
New options are selectable and persist on save
ux_changes: Source data platform dropdown expanded from 2 to 7 options.
middleware_changes: Backend updated to accept and validate the new source data platform values.
data_model_changes: Source data platform field updated to support the expanded set of values.
